claim: Seventeenth MCC measurement: v14 composed detector + 12 more validated annotation classes mined from the v14 FN pool (transcription_antitermination, ssra_binding, nucleotide_exchange_factor, ribosome_subunit_maturation, rna_polymerase_subunit, pyrophosphohydrolase, phosphocarrier_hpr, dihydrofolate_synthase, pts_enzyme_i, flavin_reductase, primosomal_protein, atp_dependent_helicase) + the trna_pseudouridine_synthase pattern widened from 'trna pseudouridine synthase' -> 'trna pseudouridine' so it catches truA and truB (whose products have paren variants the narrow original missed). Full 455-gene sweep at seed=42: MCC = 0.537, delta +0.043 over v14's 0.494, delta +0.173 over v10b's 0.364 (+47.5 percent relative).
source_detail: Reproducible via 'python scripts/run_sweep_parallel.py --all --workers 4 --use-rust --scale 0.05 --t-end-s 0.5 --detector composed --seed 42 --threshold 0.1 --enable-imb155-patches'. Preserved outputs at outputs/predictions_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.1_w4_composed_all455_v15_round2_priors.csv + outputs/metrics_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.1_w4_composed_all455_v15_round2_priors.json. Sweep wall: 3011.4 s (6.6 s/gene effective on 4 workers).
caveats: Round-2 prior-mining projection vs actual: pre-sweep expected +17 TPs +0 FPs MCC ~0.537. Actual: +17 TPs +0 FPs MCC 0.537. Exact.
Cumulative Session-15 result: MCC 0.364 -> 0.537, +0.173 absolute, +47.5 percent relative. v15 puts the detector 0.053 away from the brief target of 0.59.

Remaining 96 FNs are harder: 84 (87 percent) are annotated 'Uncharacterized' / 'putative' / 'hypothetical' with no keyword-matchable biology; the other 12 are specific genes (e.g. trxA thioredoxin, hupA DNA-binding, ietA toxin-antitoxin, recR recombination) whose Breuer annotation doesn't cluster with other essentials. Keyword-prior mining has hit diminishing returns.

Next honest levers: (a) Tier-1 XGBoost over ESMFold structural features + MACE kcat aggregates once the user's Colab populate run lands; structural + coevolutionary signals should help separate the 84 'Uncharacterized but essential' from 'Uncharacterized and nonessential'. (b) Longer-bio-time sims to catch the few remaining catalytic-silencing essentials that scale=0.05 / t=0.5s misses (Path A, previously falsified at MCC 0.125 but now re-enabled by v15's much higher baseline).

v15 precision is 0.990 (287 TP out of 290 positive predictions). The 3 remaining FPs are the SAME 3 that have survived every round since v12: nothing in v13/v14/v15 reintroduced or closed them. They are detector-level artefacts of the complex-assembly / trajectory paths, not annotation-level.

Per-gene wall rose to 6.6s (from v13's 2.2s) because the iMB155 20-token patched rules fire 20x more events per step. A candidate optimisation: lower _UNGATED_TOKEN_COUNT from 20 to 10 and verify MCC is preserved; would roughly halve sweep cost without losing NNATr's recovery (whose wt=24 comfortably clears the 20-threshold).
